simpleWalls.title: Online purchase
simpleWalls.description: This purchase is for simple rectangular walls, without complex openings or sloped ceilings. Examples:
simpleWalls.complexWalls: Have complex walls with arches or many openings?

general.title: General conditions
general.items:
The quote is calculated from the actual wall measurements, including a technical excess of 10 cm in height and the number of panels needed based on width.
For shipping or pickup, the balance must be paid in full.
Delivery time: 20 business days from order confirmation, except for special agreements previously informed.
The quote does not include installation service.
Tones may show slight variations from the digital sample due to printing processes and screen settings. We do not work with tone references from other materials (paint, melamine, ceramics).
Our products have an artisanal process and each piece is hand-trimmed. This may generate minor variations, characteristic of a product made with dedication and attention to detail.
We do not provide or coordinate installation service. We can suggest specialized professionals; however, their hiring and execution are independent of Mercedes Costal.
Any discrepancy in the order (printing errors or joining issues) must be verified before installation and reported to Mercedes Costal. Once the wallpaper is installed, related claims will not be accepted.

returns.title: Return / claims policy
returns.items:
Claims may be made within 15 days after receiving the product.
It is essential to verify the material before installation. Once installed, we cannot process claims.
Mercedes Costal is not responsible for installation costs or inconveniences.
For approved returns, the amount will not be refunded in cash; an equivalent credit in m² will be granted to use in a future purchase.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual property
intellectualProperty.items: Designs are property of Mercedes Costal and are intended exclusively for decorative use. Reproduction or use for other purposes without written authorization is prohibited.

shipping.title: Shipping
shipping.items: Shipments are the exclusive responsibility of the customer and the contracted transport service.

simpleWalls.title: Online purchase — Simple walls
simpleWalls.items: This purchase is for simple rectangular walls, without complex openings or sloped ceilings. If you have walls with complex shapes, arches or many openings, contact a sales rep.
